title: Functional Spec Frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter of specs/functional.md. All fields are used by the MasterOrchestrator and agent-contract system to verify spec completeness before DAG construction.

version.description: Semantic version of this spec document (e.g. '1.0.0').

project_name.description: Human-readable name of the project this spec belongs to.

rf_count.description: Total number of functional requirements (RFs) declared in this spec.

rfs_completed.description: Number of RFs with verified evidence of completion.

coverage_target.description: Minimum percentage of RFs that must be completed before the project exits PHASE 1 (0–100).

budget_max_usd.description: Optional maximum budget in USD for the implementation of this spec.

validated.description: Whether the frontmatter has been validated by tools/validate-specs.py.

validated_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime of the last successful validation.
